customManagers.description: Keep the ARG *_VERSION pins in sync across both Dockerfiles. .devcontainer/Dockerfile is a build-mode copy of template/Dockerfile; the built-in dockerfile manager already bumps FROM digests in both, so scope this regex manager to both too — otherwise fzf/git-delta bumps land only in template/ and the dogfood drifts every cycle (reconciled previously by a manual `aic sync`).
